summary: Reigning European champions in a fluid 4-3-3 / 4-2-3-1 that dominates possession with purpose — but the risky rest-defence leaves them open to counters.
style: 4-3-3 / 4-2-3-1 with fluidity — wide players 1v1, fullbacks high & wide (wingers roll inside), five always across the front-line, dominate possession with purpose, risky rest-defence to counter-press.

counterReliance.note: Dominate possession — they counter-press, not counter

strengths: Five always across the front-line with rolling wingers
Aggressive counter-press to win it back
weaknesses: Risky rest-defence — open to counters (need to win the ball back first)

keyPlayers.name: Lamine Yamal
keyPlayers.note: Goals & assists, direct dribbling, through-passing & crosses — lit up the Euros at 16/17 and ready for the World stage

tactics: Dominate the ball, keep five across the front and counter-press aggressively. The risky rest-defence is the way to hurt them — if you can get the ball first.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
